name: sigrank
description: SigRank — ranks AI coding operators by token cascade efficiency (Yield = Cache Reads × Output / Input²). Tools for yield calculation, leaderboard queries, operator lookups, local token usage pulls, and signed token-count submission to the public board. Privacy-first: runs locally, only four token counts leave the machine (ed25519-signed).

SIGRANK_API_BASE.title: SigRank API Base URL
SIGRANK_API_BASE.description: Overrides the board host for the SigRank API. Defaults to https://signalaf.com.
